markets.no_sub_title: Xavier Edwards: 2+
markets.rules_primary: If Xavier Edwards records 2+ home runs in Colorado vs Miami professional baseball game originally scheduled for Mar 28, 2026 at 4:10 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Xavier Edwards is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Xavier Edwards starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Xavier Edwards is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Xavier Edwards is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on home runs recorded.
